prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original 5.9L inline-8 (engine code: *Isotta Fraschini 8A*) with a fully balanced and blueprinted version featuring forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a custom billet crankshaft by JE Pistons to handle 650+ HP reliably. Pair with a custom camshaft profile by Schrick (280° duration, 12mm lift) for aggressive overlap and high-RPM power delivery.

Forced Induction: Install a bespoke twin-screw supercharger system by Sprintex (model: S5-2150) with an integrated air-to-water intercooler (PWR Advanced Cooling) and a custom intake manifold fabricated from 6061-T6 aluminum, designed to flow 1,200 CFM. Boost pressure set to 12 psi with a custom wastegate by Turbosmart (Hyper-Gate45) to prevent over-boost.

Drivetrain & Handling: Replace the original 3-speed manual transmission with a Tremec TR-6060 6-speed (close-ratio) paired with a twin-disc ceramic clutch by Sachs Performance (300mm diameter). Install a Quaife ATB differential (80% lock) in the rear axle. Suspension overhaul includes custom Öhlins TTX40 coilovers (adjustable damping, 2-way compression/rebound) with spherical bearing top mounts by Whiteline, and a full polygraphite bushing kit by SuperPro for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Bodywork: Restore the original aluminum body panels with hand-beaten 1.2mm 5052 aluminum replacements by Classic Sheet Metal (Los Angeles), retaining the original riveted construction. Apply a custom 3-stage paint job by BASF Glasurit (color: *Isotta Rosso Corsa Metallic* with gold leaf pinstriping by Steve Kafka).

Aerodynamics: Install a custom front splitter and rear diffuser by APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3K twill weave) designed specifically for the Tipo 8A’s pre-war aerodynamics. Add a functional hood scoop (carbon fiber, by Seibon) to direct airflow into the supercharger intercooler. Side skirts by RK Sport (aluminum, hand-formed) to reduce drag and improve airflow to the rear wheels.

Interior: Full retrim by Katzkin Leather (material: *Bridge of Weir* full-grain leather in *Tobacco Brown* with contrast stitching in *Burgundy*). Replace the original wooden steering wheel with a custom Nardi 14-inch wheel (walnut rim, aluminum spokes) and install a digital dash by Motec (C127 display) with analog-style gauges for oil pressure, boost, and AFR. Add a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, powder-coated *Gunmetal Gray*) with integrated harness bar for 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses.
